message:
fix: unpin CLI/model also removes legacy AGENT_CLI_PINNED flag

The per-dimension unpin endpoints only removed AGENT_PIN_CLI or
AGENT_PIN_MODEL but left the legacy AGENT_CLI_PINNED flag intact.
Scanner used the legacy flag, so unpinning CLI never actually
worked. Now both cli and model unpin also clear the legacy flag.

Also fixes the optimistic UI update to clear pinnedBoth when
unpinning either dimension, so the pin icon disappears
immediately.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
